summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invoice Edit feature and Create Invoice description auto-population. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly for both features.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} - Edit invoice due date
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} - Edit line items with total recalculation
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} - Add new line item to existing invoice
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent invoice
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} - Handles empty line items array
Backend: POST /api/invoices - Create invoice with service type description
Frontend: Invoice View page shows Edit button with data-testid
Frontend: Edit Invoice dialog opens with client, due date, line items, notes fields
Frontend: Edit Invoice - Add Item button adds new line item form
Frontend: Edit Invoice - Save Changes updates invoice and shows success toast
Frontend: Edit Invoice - Totals recalculate correctly (subtotal, CGST, SGST, grand total)
Frontend: Create Invoice - Service Type dropdown auto-populates description
Frontend: Create Invoice - No separate editable description input field exists
Frontend: Create Invoice - Description changes when Service Type changes (Day Pass, Security Deposit, etc.)
Frontend: Create Invoice - Live Preview updates in real-time
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice Edit endpoint correctly converts dict to LineItem objects before calculation
Total recalculation works correctly when line items are modified
Create Invoice page correctly auto-populates description from SERVICE_TYPES array
No separate description input field - description is read-only display from service type
Edit Invoice dialog has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Success toast displays after invoice update
Invoice preview updates in real-time on Create Invoice page
seed_data_creation: Used existing invoice f67b3b33-e036-41a8-bb71-b421585df59b for testing. Modified line items and notes during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Edit feature fully implemented and tested. PUT /api/invoices/{id} endpoint accepts client_id, due_date, notes, line_items, status. Line items are recalculated with GST when modified. Create Invoice page at /admin/create-invoice auto-populates description from Service Type dropdown - no separate description input exists. Admin credentials: admin@thryve.in / password

invoice_edit.edit_button: ✓ Present on invoice view page with data-testid='edit-invoice-btn'
invoice_edit.edit_dialog: ✓ Opens with client, due date, line items, notes fields
invoice_edit.total_recalculation: ✓ Subtotal, CGST (9%), SGST (9%), Grand Total recalculate correctly
invoice_edit.save_changes: ✓ Save Changes button updates invoice and shows success toast
invoice_edit.persistence: ✓ Changes persist after save (verified with GET)

create_invoice_description.service_type_dropdown: ✓ Shows all service types (Monthly Plan, Day Pass, Security Deposit, Setup Charges, Meeting Room)
create_invoice_description.description_auto_populate: ✓ Description auto-populates from selected service type
create_invoice_description.no_separate_input: ✓ No editable description input field exists
create_invoice_description.live_preview: ✓ Preview updates in real-time with selected service type

current_state.notes: Updated notes via UI test - March 2026
